message:
feat(core): add activation, commit replay, observability, explanation, repair, and types modules

Six new core infrastructure modules establishing the foundation for
frankensearch's operational reliability layer:

- activation.rs (+457 lines): activation logic for managing index
  segment lifecycle transitions, warmup sequencing, and readiness
  signaling with structured health checks
- commit_replay.rs (+280 lines): deterministic commit replay engine
  for crash recovery, enabling point-in-time index reconstruction
  from the write-ahead log
- distributed_observability.rs (+269 lines): distributed tracing and
  metrics collection infrastructure for multi-node search deployments
  with structured span emission and aggregation
- explanation.rs (+303 lines): query explanation and scoring
  transparency module providing detailed breakdowns of how results
  are ranked, scored, and filtered for debugging and tuning
- repair.rs (+251 lines): self-repair mechanisms for detecting and
  recovering from index corruption, segment inconsistencies, and
  metadata drift without full rebuilds
- types.rs (+381 lines): shared type definitions and domain models
  used across the core crate including index metadata, segment
  descriptors, health states, and error taxonomies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
